query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isInStock, p.isAvailable, p.availableDelivery, p.availableInstore, s.name as subcategory, s.availableDelivery as subcat_delivery
FROM products p
JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id
WHERE s.name LIKE '%Mochi%' OR s.name LIKE '%Signature%'
ORDER BY s.name, p.name;
